runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="At least 3 characters"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="name@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Other Info (conditional) -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Contribution Description"
        placeholder="Explain what you can offer"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Write something about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

args.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields
} from "elements";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" }
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" }
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => values
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >

    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="At least 3 characters"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="name@example.com"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Other Info (conditional) -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Contribution Description"
        placeholder="Explain what you can offer"
        type="text"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency (conditional) -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio (optional) -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Write something about yourself..."
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        class="w-full"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>
